channel.title: Neelesh Yadav — Engineering Blog
channel.description: Engineering write-ups on React Native, React, performance, real-time systems, and shipping production mobile + web apps.

item.title: In-App Purchases in React Native — Subscriptions on iOS + Android
item.description: Wiring App Store and Play Billing into a React Native app with react-native-iap or RevenueCat — covering product setup, server-side receipt validation, restore purchases, the introductory-offer trap on iOS, and why client-side entitlement is always a lie.

item.title: Push Notifications in React Native — FCM + APNs Done Right
item.description: End-to-end push notification setup for React Native using Firebase Cloud Messaging on Android and APNs via FCM on iOS — covering token rotation, background handlers, deep links, notification channels, and the silent failures nobody documents.

item.title: 60fps Reels on Low-End Android with Reanimated v4 Worklets
item.description: How we rebuilt the Yoke Reels feed to hold 60fps on a Snapdragon 665 — covering Reanimated v4 worklets, useAnimatedScrollHandler, runOnJS bridging, and the lifecycle-aware playback trick that cut RAM by ~30%.

item.title: MMKV vs AsyncStorage in React Native — Picking the Right Persistence Layer
item.description: When to use MMKV, when to stick with AsyncStorage, and how to migrate without losing user data. A practical comparison from running both in production on Soul33, plus the secure-storage gotcha you don't want to learn at submission time.

item.title: CI/CD for React Native with Fastlane — From Commit to TestFlight & Play
item.description: How to wire Fastlane + GitHub Actions so every merge to main builds, signs, and ships a release candidate to TestFlight Internal and Play Internal Testing. Includes match for cert sync, the credentials JSON Play wants, and the cache that cuts build time by ~40%.

item.title: Implementing Sign In with Apple in React Native (iOS + Android)
item.description: A complete walkthrough of integrating Sign In with Apple using @invertase/react-native-apple-authentication — covering Xcode capability setup, Android workaround via JWT, private email relay, credential state handling, and App Store compliance gotchas.

item.title: Google Sign In with React Native — The Complete Guide
item.description: Everything you need to implement Google Sign In using @react-native-google-signin/google-signin — from SHA-1 fingerprint setup and OAuth client IDs, to silent sign-in, token refresh, Play Integrity, and the iOS URL scheme trap that breaks half of all setups.

item.title: Deploying a React Native App to the App Store — Full Xcode Walkthrough
item.description: A step-by-step production deployment guide for iOS — covering Apple Developer account setup, certificates, provisioning profiles, Xcode archive, TestFlight distribution, App Store Connect metadata, and the review gotchas that cause most first-time rejections.

item.title: Deploying a React Native App to Google Play — Android Studio & Play Console Guide
item.description: The complete production deployment guide for Android — covering keystore generation, Gradle signing config, AAB builds in Android Studio, Play Console setup, internal/closed/open tracks, Play App Signing, and avoiding the policy violations that get new apps suspended.

item.title: Boosting React Native Performance: New Architecture Deep Dive
item.description: How enabling the New React Native Architecture improved Soul33's runtime performance by 40% — a real migration story covering JSI, Fabric, TurboModules, and the 40+ library audit I did before touching a single line.

item.title: Building Real-Time Chat with WebSocket in React Native
item.description: Lessons from building a production WebSocket group chat supporting 200+ concurrent sessions — covering connection lifecycle, offline queuing, message deduplication, swipe-to-reply, and audio messages.

item.title: AR Try-On: Three.js + MediaPipe in React Native
item.description: How I shipped a real-time AR lipstick try-on for Barva Skin Therapie using Three.js and MediaPipe Face Landmarker inside a React Native WebView — no native AR SDK needed.

item.title: Optimizing FlatList: Reducing Re-renders by 40%
item.description: A practical guide to memoisation, getItemLayout, windowSize, and keyExtractor techniques that eliminated 40% of unnecessary re-renders in a 100-screen React Native app.

item.title: Next.js vs Vite + React: When to Choose What
item.description: A practical, opinionated comparison of Next.js and Vite + React based on shipping both in production — covering SSR, SSG, bundle size, DX, and the exact decision matrix I now use on every project.

item.title: Tailwind CSS at Scale: Component Patterns That Work
item.description: How I structure Tailwind CSS in large React projects without creating utility soup — covering cva for variants, design tokens in config, and the abstraction boundary rule that keeps codebases clean.
